message:
Add REST API with full git porcelain layer and 28 API tests

- git-porcelain.ts: complete high-level git operations (commit, branch,
  tag, merge, cherry-pick, revert, reset, diff, log, rev-parse, status)
- REST API at /api/repos/:owner/:repo/ with 30+ endpoints
- Fix three-way merge deletion handling (base==ours, theirs deleted)
- 28 new integration tests covering all API operations
- Test worker updated to match production routing
